children.heading: Establishment of restoration program
children.label: a Establishment of restoration program
children.text: The Administrator shall establish within the Environmental Protection Agency the Lake Pontchartrain Basin Restoration Program.

children.heading: Purpose
children.label: b Purpose
children.text: The purpose of the program shall be to restore the ecological health of the Basin by developing and funding restoration projects and related scientific and public education projects.
provide administrative and technical assistance to a management conference convened for the Basin under ;section 1330 of this title
assist and support the activities of the management conference, including the implementation of recommendations of the management conference;
support environmental monitoring of the Basin and research to provide necessary technical and scientific information;
develop a comprehensive research plan to address the technical needs of the program;
coordinate the grant, research, and planning programs authorized under this section;
collect and make available to the public publications, and other forms of information the management conference determines to be appropriate, relating to the environmental quality of the Basin; and

ensure that the comprehensive conservation and management plan approved for the Basin under is reviewed and revised in accordance with not less often than once every 5 years, beginning on .section 1330 of this titlesection 1330 of this titleDecember 23, 2022
for restoration projects and studies identified in the comprehensive conservation and management plan approved for the Basin under ; andsection 1330 of this title
for public education projects recommended by the management conference.

children.heading: Basin
children.label: 1 Basin
children.text: The term “Basin” means the Lake Pontchartrain Basin, a 10,000 square mile watershed encompassing 16 parishes in the State of Louisiana and 4 counties in the State of Mississippi.

children.heading: Program
children.label: 2 Program
children.text: The term “program” means the Lake Pontchartrain Basin Restoration Program established under subsection (a).

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $20,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2001 through 2012 and the amount appropriated for fiscal year 2009 for each of fiscal years 2013 through 2017. Such sums shall remain available until expended.

children.heading: Public education projects
children.label: 2 Public education projects
children.text: Not more than 15 percent of the amount appropriated pursuant to paragraph (1) in a fiscal year may be expended on grants for public education projects under subsection (d)(2).

children.heading: Administrative expenses
children.label: 3 Administrative expenses
children.text: Not more than 5 percent of the amounts appropriated to carry out this section may be used for administrative expenses.
